title: Task Test Result
description: Wave R — per-leaf test execution result. Carries pass/fail counts, output summary, duration. Distinct from the wave-level test_results aggregate.

test_command.description: Resolved test command (e.g. 'npm test', 'vitest run path', 'node --test test/leaf-001/')

skipped_reason.description: Populated when the runner skipped tests (e.g. no test command resolved, tests-per-leaf disabled).
